stimulus:
• In 2019, a research team led by Jian Li measured the average wingspans of adult individuals from various bat species.
  • Pipistrellus pipistrellus is a species of bat in the family Vespertilionidae.
  • Pipistrellus pipistrellus adults had an average wingspan of 21.3 cm.
  • Pteropus vampyrus is a species of bat in the family Pteropodidae.
  • Pteropus vampyrus adults had an average wingspan of 152.4 cm.
stem: Which choice most effectively uses information from the given sentences to emphasize a difference between the wingspans of the two species?

answerOptions.content: While Pipistrellus pipistrellus adults had an average wingspan of 21.3 cm, Pteropus vampyrus adults had an average wingspan of 152.4 cm.
The research team led by Jian Li measured the average wingspans of adult bats from various species.
Pipistrellus pipistrellus belongs to the family Vespertilionidae, while Pteropus vampyrus belongs to the family Pteropodidae.
Pteropus vampyrus adults had an average wingspan of 152.4 cm.

rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. The sentence emphasizes a difference between the wingspans of the two species by stating each species’ average wingspan side by side.

Choice B is incorrect. The sentence describes the study but doesn’t state the wingspans of either species. Choice C is incorrect. The sentence emphasizes a difference in family, not in wingspan. Choice D is incorrect. The sentence reports only one species’ wingspan, so it cannot emphasize a difference between the two species.
